details.message: reports/board/ directory is missing. Expected top-level subdirectory under reports/.
reports/board/ directory is missing. memory_bank/ and .cursor/automations/ (with README + specs) and reports/audit/ are present.

moltbot/ directory exists with active code (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py, agents/). Prior CSA evidence (CSA_VERDICT_clawdbot_removal.json) documents removal intent.

Moltbot references found in active code/config. Affected paths: moltbot/ (6 files), scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py.
